name: game-theory-app
description: Web app educativa de Teoria de Juegos (Dilema del Prisionero)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.mp:dev: concurrently -n MP-BACKEND,MP-FRONTEND -c magenta,cyan "npm run mp:backend" "npm run mp:frontend"
scripts.mp:serve: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3102 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Set-Location multiplayer-backend; $env:MP_PORT='3102'; $env:MP_SERVE_STATIC='true'; $env:MP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS='*'; npm start"
